subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath in this moment willed to make mention of one among His servants, that through grace and loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در این حین اراده نموده یکی از عباد را ذکر نماید تا بفضل و عنایت و
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
